name: Barbecued Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1 lb MEDIUM SIZE, FRESH, RAW SHRIMP
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place shrimp in a single layer at the bottom of an 11 x 7 x 2 inch baking pan.
3. Sprinkle cayenne pepper evenly over the shrimp.
4. Dot each shrimp with margarine.
5. Bake for 5 minutes.
6. Stir the shrimp to coat them thoroughly with margarine.
7. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
8. Repeat step 6 one more time, then remove from the oven.
9. Serve hot immediately.
10. Do not overcook; otherwise, the shrimp will become mushy.
11. Serve as is, peeling at the table.
